ideation: This animation sequence shows the robot carefully checking a thermometer.  The robot will hold the thermometer (represented by the right arm) at arm's length, then bring it closer to examine it more closely. The left arm will remain at the side for balance. Frame 1 shows the robot extending its right arm to check the thermometer. Frame 2 shows the robot bringing the thermometer closer. Frame 3 shows the robot looking at the thermometer. Frame 4 shows the robot putting the thermometer down.

frames.beat: left arm rests, right arm extends to check temperature
right arm brings the thermometer closer for a better look
both arms hold steady, examining the reading
arms return to rest, the temperature is noted
